description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wallet with a sleek black exterior and a layered, modular design. The wallet features a visible money clip on top, holding a folded banknote securely in place. Along the side, several stacked cards are visible, each with a different colored edge, suggesting organized card slots within the wallet. The wallet's construction appears to be primarily metal, with some plastic or composite elements, and a matte finish that gives it a modern, minimalist look. On one side, a Mastercard logo and some text are visible, indicating the presence of branded cards inside. The overall build is slim and rigid, designed for easy portability and urban use.
description: A slim, black, modular wallet with a money clip and visible stacked cards, featuring a modern matte finish and a compact, rigid design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered card slots with colored edges and the money clip holding a folded banknote on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide money clip and the compact, stacked arrangement of cards beneath it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the Mastercard logo on a card and the wallet's layered card organization.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the money clip and the colored card edges, with the wallet's slim profile evident.
attribute_brand_logo: A Mastercard logo is visible on one of the cards inserted into the wallet, located on the right side in view 2. The logo is circular, featuring the classic red and yellow overlapping circles with the word 'Mastercard' in white.
attribute_closure_type: money clip and card slot friction; no external closure mechanism visible.
